category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers exporting to the Thailand market (TISI mandatory TIS certification, EGAT Energy Label No.5, NBTC).

title.en: China-to-Thailand LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入泰国：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入泰國：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Thailand requirements — mandatory TISI / TIS certification and the TIS mark (e.g. TIS 2780 LED lamp safety), EGAT Energy Label No.5 with DEDE MEPS, and NBTC type approval for smart lighting — versus Chinese GB / GB/T standards and CCC certification.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与泰国要求差距对照——泰国工业标准研究院（TISI）强制性 TIS 认证及 TIS 标志（如 TIS 2780 LED 灯安全）、EGAT 5 号能效标签配合 DEDE 最低能效标准（MEPS）、以及智能照明的 NBTC 型号核准——并与中国 GB / GB/T 标准及 CCC 认证对比。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與泰國要求差距對照——泰國工業標準研究院（TISI）強制性 TIS 認證及 TIS 標誌（如 TIS 2780 LED 燈安全）、EGAT 5 號能效標籤配合 DEDE 最低能效標準（MEPS）、以及智能照明的 NBTC 型號核准——並與中國 GB / GB/T 標準及 CCC 認證對比。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity assessment, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and TISI licence holders should verify current Thai law, mandatory TIS standards, EGAT Energy Label No.5 and DEDE MEPS thresholds, NBTC type approval requirements, and restricted-substance obligations with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商及 TISI 许可证持有人在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行泰国法律、强制性 TIS 标准、EGAT 5 号能效标签及 DEDE 最低能效标准（MEPS）阈值、NBTC 型号核准要求及限用物质义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商及 TISI 許可證持有人在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行泰國法律、強制性 TIS 標準、EGAT 5 號能效標籤及 DEDE 最低能效標準（MEPS）閾值、NBTC 型號核准要求及限用物質義務。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer exporting to Thailand must obtain TISI mandatory TIS certification and apply the TIS mark (e.g. TIS 2780-2561 for LED lamp safety) through a licence held by an in-country importer or manufacturer; meet EGAT Energy Label No.5 efficiency criteria and DEDE Minimum Energy Performance Standards before the No.5 label can be displayed; obtain NBTC type approval where the luminaire has wireless/smart functions (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth); design to Thailand's 230 V / 50 Hz grid (same 50 Hz as China, but nominal voltage differs from China's 220 V); and address restricted-substance and hazardous-waste expectations even though Thailand has no horizontal RoHS in force (a WEEE/RoHS-style law has been in draft). None of these are covered by existing China CCC certification or GB-standard test reports, which Thailand does not recognise for TIS licensing.
answer_first.zh: 出口泰国的中国 LED 灯具制造商须：通过在地进口商或制造商持有的许可证取得泰国工业标准研究院（TISI）强制性 TIS 认证并加贴 TIS 标志（如 LED 灯安全的 TIS 2780-2561）；满足 EGAT 5 号能效标签效率标准及 DEDE 最低能效标准（MEPS），方可显示 5 号标签；在灯具具备无线/智能功能（Wi-Fi、蓝牙）时取得 NBTC 型号核准；按泰国 230 V / 50 Hz 电网设计（与中国同为 50 Hz，但额定电压不同于中国 220 V）；并应对限用物质及危险废物相关要求——尽管泰国目前无横向 RoHS 生效（WEEE/RoHS 类法律一直处于草案阶段）。上述均不被现有中国 CCC 认证或 GB 标准检测报告所涵盖，泰国 TIS 许可亦不予承认。
answer_first.zht: 出口泰國的中國 LED 燈具製造商須：通過在地進口商或製造商持有的許可證取得泰國工業標準研究院（TISI）強制性 TIS 認證並加貼 TIS 標誌（如 LED 燈安全的 TIS 2780-2561）；滿足 EGAT 5 號能效標籤效率標準及 DEDE 最低能效標準（MEPS），方可顯示 5 號標籤；在燈具具備無線/智能功能（Wi-Fi、藍牙）時取得 NBTC 型號核准；按泰國 230 V / 50 Hz 電網設計（與中國同為 50 Hz，但額定電壓不同於中國 220 V）；並應對限用物質及危險廢物相關要求——儘管泰國目前無橫向 RoHS 生效（WEEE/RoHS 類法律一直處於草案階段）。上述均不被現有中國 CCC 認證或 GB 標準檢測報告所涵蓋，泰國 TIS 許可亦不予承認。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Mandatory TIS list, EGAT Energy Label No.5 / DEDE MEPS thresholds, NBTC type-approval scope, and any enacted Thai RoHS/WEEE law must be re-verified against current TISI, EGAT, DEDE, and NBTC publications on each review cycle.
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be true. TIS numbers and edition years, plus EGAT No.5 criteria, must be re-verified against current TISI and EGAT sources on each review cycle.
